    Ongoing

  • Exhibits Don't Miss

    Ancestral Ecologies

    May 23–October 25, 2026

    A project of the 2026 Heidi Nitze Art × Environment Fellows, Ancestral Ecologies offers four multisensory installations that explore animist frameworks through distinct environmental and material phenomena. Learn More › about Ancestral Ecologies

  • Exhibits Don't Miss

    Block by Block

    May 23–October 25, 2026

    For 30 years, the Greenest Block in Brooklyn contest has demonstrated how small collective actions can build communities and transform neighborhoods, block by block. Celebrate this anniversary with special exhibits and events. Learn More › about Block by Block

  • Exhibits Don't Miss

    Block by Block: Streetscapes

    May 23–October 25, 2026

    Block by Block re-creates the stoops and streetscapes of 2025 Greenest Block in Brooklyn winners on the Garden’s grounds. Co‑created with many of the contest’s greening stars, the exhibition invites you to find inspiration from these green-thumbed Brooklynites! Learn More › about Block by Block: Streetscapes

  • Exhibits Don't Miss

    Brooklyn’s Greening Heroes

    May 23–October 25, 2026

    Brooklyn’s Greening Heroes features portraits and first-person stories from residents who have turned gardening into community-building. Learn More › about Brooklyn’s Greening Heroes

    Sunday, July 12, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Family Discovery Weekends

    Saturdays & Sundays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 11–August 9, 2026 | Drop-in

    Hands-on stations throughout the garden’s meadow, woodland, and marsh habitats and in the vegetable garden encourage families to explore nature together. Learn More › about Summer Family Discovery Weekends

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

    Discover summer blooms and other highlights of the season in this free walk led by trained Garden Guides. Learn More › about Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Wednesday, July 15, 2026

  • Horticulture Certificate | Continuing Education Classes Don't Miss

    Woody Landscape Plant ID

    6 weekly sessions beginning Tuesday, May 5; Thursday, May 7; or Wednesday, July 15, 2026 | Waitlist Only

    Woody plants—including shade trees, ornamental trees, and evergreen and deciduous shrubs—form the backbone of a well-planned landscape design. Learn More › about Woody Landscape Plant ID

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer First Discoveries

    Wednesdays & Fridays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 8–August 14, 2026 | Drop-in

    Pot up a plant, create a craft, read a story, and use your senses to explore nature at activity stations designed for early learners up to 4 years old. Learn More › about Summer First Discoveries

  • Health & Wellness Classes | Continuing Education Classes Don't Miss

    An Introduction to Medicinal Plants

    Wednesday, July 15, 2026 | 5:30–7 p.m. | Waitlist Only

    Learn about medicinal plants and plant-based treatments. Learn More › about An Introduction to Medicinal Plants

  • Member Events | Evenings Don't Miss

    Members’ Summer Evenings

    Wednesdays, May 27–September 2 , 2026 | 6–8:30 p.m.

    Savor the Garden during the twilight hours—just for members! Learn More › about Members’ Summer Evenings

    Thursday, July 16, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Discovery Days

    Thursdays, July 16–August 13, 2026 | 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | Drop-in

    Experiment, learn, and play together in the Discovery Garden! Families, school groups, and camp groups welcome. Learn More › about Summer Discovery Days

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

    Discover summer blooms and other highlights of the season in this free walk led by trained Garden Guides. Learn More › about Seasonal Highlights Tour

  • Evenings Don't Miss

    Ancestral Ecologies Artist Talk

    Thursday, July 16, 2026 | 6–7 p.m.

    Join us for an artist-led tour of Ancestral Ecologies, a site-specific exhibition by artist Olalekan Jeyifous and environmental art and architecture practice AD—WO, the inaugural fellows of BBG’s new Heidi Nitze Art × Environment Fellowship. Learn More › about Ancestral Ecologies Artist Talk

  • Don't Miss
    Evenings | Performances Don't Miss

    Jazz in July

    Thursdays, July 9, 16 & 23 | 6–8 p.m.

    Celebrate summer at Brooklyn Botanic Garden with jazz performances, tours, and more. Learn More › about Jazz in July

  • Evenings | Performances Don't Miss

    Jazz in July: Itai Kriss and Telavana

    Thursday, July 16, 2026 | 7–8 p.m.

    Experience the boundary-pushing energy of jazz ensemble Televana, led by Grammy-nominated flute virtuoso Itai Kriss. Learn More › about Jazz in July: Itai Kriss and Telavana

  • Continuing Education Classes | Maker Classes Don't Miss

    Greenest Mocktail in Brooklyn

    Single session on Thursday, July 16 or July 30, 2026 | 7:30–9 p.m. | Preregistration Required

    Learn to make fresh mocktails that incorporate herbs you can easily grow on your stoop, balcony, or windowsill. Learn More › about Greenest Mocktail in Brooklyn

    Friday, July 17, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer First Discoveries

    Wednesdays & Fridays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 8–August 14, 2026 | Drop-in

    Pot up a plant, create a craft, read a story, and use your senses to explore nature at activity stations designed for early learners up to 4 years old. Learn More › about Summer First Discoveries

    Saturday, July 18, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Family Discovery Weekends

    Saturdays & Sundays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 11–August 9, 2026 | Drop-in

    Hands-on stations throughout the garden’s meadow, woodland, and marsh habitats and in the vegetable garden encourage families to explore nature together. Learn More › about Summer Family Discovery Weekends

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

    Discover summer blooms and other highlights of the season in this free walk led by trained Garden Guides. Learn More › about Seasonal Highlights Tour

  • Gardening Classes | Continuing Education Classes Don't Miss

    Cultivating the Carnivorous Plants of New York

    Saturday, July 18, 2026 | 12:30–3:30 p.m | Preregistration Required

    Learn cultivation techniques and relevant ecology for these species and pot up your own New York carnivore to take home. Learn More › about Cultivating the Carnivorous Plants of New York

    Sunday, July 19, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Family Discovery Weekends

    Saturdays & Sundays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 11–August 9, 2026 | Drop-in

    Hands-on stations throughout the garden’s meadow, woodland, and marsh habitats and in the vegetable garden encourage families to explore nature together. Learn More › about Summer Family Discovery Weekends

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

    Discover summer blooms and other highlights of the season in this free walk led by trained Garden Guides. Learn More › about Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Monday, July 20, 2026

  • Don't Miss
    Performances Don't Miss

    Forever Green Soundbath

    Monday, July 20, 2026 (Rain date: Tuesday, July 21) | 7:30 p.m. doors; performance 8:30–10 p.m. | Ticketed Event

    Experience a collaborative soundscape exploring the connections between Brooklyn Botanic Garden and its community. Find a spot on the grass of Cherry Esplanade, lie back, and soak up the multisensory experience. Learn More › about Forever Green Soundbath

    Wednesday, July 22, 2026

  • Children's Garden Classes | Children’s Garden Classes Don't Miss

    Garden Adventures

    Wednesday–Friday for two weeks starting July 8, July 22, or August 5, 2026 | 9 a.m.–1 p.m. | Preregistration Required

    This 6-session program incorporates planting, harvesting, science experiments, and nature art projects.

    Learn More › about Garden Adventures

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer First Discoveries

    Wednesdays & Fridays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 8–August 14, 2026 | Drop-in

    Pot up a plant, create a craft, read a story, and use your senses to explore nature at activity stations designed for early learners up to 4 years old. Learn More › about Summer First Discoveries

  • Member Events | Evenings Don't Miss

    Members’ Summer Evenings

    Wednesdays, May 27–September 2 , 2026 | 6–8:30 p.m.

    Savor the Garden during the twilight hours—just for members! Learn More › about Members’ Summer Evenings

    Thursday, July 23, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Discovery Days

    Thursdays, July 16–August 13, 2026 | 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | Drop-in

    Experiment, learn, and play together in the Discovery Garden! Families, school groups, and camp groups welcome. Learn More › about Summer Discovery Days

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Seasonal Highlights Tour

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

    Discover summer blooms and other highlights of the season in this free walk led by trained Garden Guides. Learn More › about Seasonal Highlights Tour

  • Don't Miss
    Evenings | Performances Don't Miss

    Jazz in July

    Thursdays, July 9, 16 & 23 | 6–8 p.m.

    Celebrate summer at Brooklyn Botanic Garden with jazz performances, tours, and more. Learn More › about Jazz in July

  • Workshops | Evenings | Access Programs Don't Miss

    Disability Pride Month Art-Making Program

    Thursday, July 23, 2026 | 6–7 p.m.

    Join Disability Pride, Disability Joy, Exists, an art-making program that celebrates disability as an integral part of human diversity. Learn More › about Disability Pride Month Art-Making Program

  • Evenings | Performances Don't Miss

    Jazz in July: Prince Emagine

    Thursday, July 23, 2026 | 7–8 p.m.

    Celebrate Brooklyn’s Little Caribbean community with Prince Emagine & Friends. Learn More › about Jazz in July: Prince Emagine

    Friday, July 24, 2026

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer First Discoveries

    Wednesdays & Fridays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 8–August 14, 2026 | Drop-in

    Pot up a plant, create a craft, read a story, and use your senses to explore nature at activity stations designed for early learners up to 4 years old. Learn More › about Summer First Discoveries

    Saturday, July 25, 2026

  • Art Classes | Continuing Education Classes Don't Miss

    Watercolor: Mixing Greens for Summer Paintings

    Saturday, July 25, 2026 | 10 a.m.–1:30 p.m. | Preregistration Required

    Learn to mix a range of green shades for summer landscapes. Learn More › about Watercolor: Mixing Greens for Summer Paintings

  • Families & Kids Don't Miss

    Summer Family Discovery Weekends

    Saturdays & Sundays, 10:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. | July 11–August 9, 2026 | Drop-in

    Hands-on stations throughout the garden’s meadow, woodland, and marsh habitats and in the vegetable garden encourage families to explore nature together. Learn More › about Summer Family Discovery Weekends

  • Tours Don't Miss

    Thursday, Saturday & Sunday, July 2–August 23, 2026 | 11 a.m.–12 p.m.

Jazz in July

Become a Member

Support the Garden and enjoy unlimited free general admission, members-only summer hours, invitations to special events, discounts, and much more.
